name: PT KMI Wire and Cable Tbk
summary: PT KMI Wire and Cable Tbk manufactures and sells various power cables in Indonesia. The company offers aluminum, copper, and ground bare conductors; low voltage power cables comprising aluminum, copper, control, flexible, and instrument cables; medium voltage power cables consisting of aluminum and copper cables; high voltage power cables; outdoor and indoor telecom cables; special purpose cables, including fire resistant, flame retardant, lead and nylon sheathed, and thermocouple cables; and aluminum and copper rods, and rod products. It supplies power cables to the state owned electricity company; and cables to private and industrial sectors comprising oil and gas, mining, industrial, and other sectors. The company sells its products directly, as well as through a chain of distributors and resellers. It also exports its products internationally. PT KMI Wire and Cable Tbk was founded in 1972 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
